debug_info.goal:
case succ.cons
α : Type u_1
elt : α
idx' : ℕ
HR :
  ∀ {l : List (List α)} {l1 : List α} {hidx : idx' < l.length},
    (l.set idx' (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
      (l.set idx' l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take idx' (List.map List.length l)).sum + l1.length) elt
l1 hd : List α
tl : List (List α)
HR2 :
  ∀ {hidx : idx' + 1 < tl.length},
    (tl.set (idx' + 1) (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
      (tl.set (idx' + 1) l1).flatten.insertIdx ((List.take (idx' + 1) (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length) elt
hidx : idx' + 1 < (hd :: tl).length
⊢ hd ++ (tl.set idx' (l1 ++ [elt])).flatten =
    (hd ++ (tl.set idx' l1).flatten).insertIdx (hd.length + (List.take idx' (List.map List.length tl)).sum + l1.length)
      elt

failed_attempts:

          | cons x xs ih => simp [List.insertIdx, ih]

rw [HR (hidx := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx)]

rw [HR (hidx := by simpa using hidx)]

rw [HR (hidx := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx)]
          induction hd with
          | nil => rfl
          | cons x xs ih =>
            simp [ih, List.insertIdx_succ, Nat.add_assoc, Nat.add_comm, Nat.add_left_comm]

rw [HR (hidx := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx)]
          induction hd <;> simp [List.insertIdx, Nat.add_assoc, *]
